name: 3p25_3_VHL_region
description: 3p25.3 region around the VHL gene and ITPR1 distal end. Carries flanking SDs that contribute to recurrent submicroscopic deletions seen in some von Hippel-Lindau and spinocerebellar ataxia 15 (ITPR1) patients.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD blocks of ~30-50 kb at ~95% identity; unique segment contains VHL, IRAK2, GHRL, partial ITPR1.
